creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
pfgshield-freebsd@yahoo.com, 06.10.07, 19:28h CEST:

> --- Stefan Walter <stefan@FreeBSD.org> escribi=F3:
>=20
> ...
> >=20
> > There is only one port making use of math/umfpack: math/freemat. And wi=
th
> > that one, it's only used if it's already installed.
> >=20
>=20
> According to freshports you have to "fix" the following ports:
>=20
> math/arpack++
> math/freefem++
> math/octave-devel
> math/petsc
> science/mbdyn
>=20
>=20
> but it might be wise to do the change only in ports that already use the =
GPL.
> (octave and mbdyn ? ). This all just my $0.02.

What do you mean when you write "fix"? The listed ports use
math/suitesparse. Do you intend to change them to use math/umfpack
instead?

Regards,
Stefan
